## Summary

Provide a short description of the change and the problem it solves.

## Related issue

- Closes: #<issue-number>

## Changes

- Describe what changed
- List any new features or bug fixes

## Testing

- Describe how the change was tested
- Include commands or steps run locally

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the contribution guidelines in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] My changes are limited to the intended scope
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] The project still runs after my changes
